# D-Link RTSP paths.
/img/video.asf	D-Link video.asf
/img/media.sav	D-Link media.sav
/img/video.sav	D-Link video.sav
/video.mjpg	D-Link video.mjpg
/video/mjpg.cgi	D-Link mjpg.cgi
/MJPEG.cgi	D-Link MJPEG.cgi
/mpeg4cif	D-Link MPEG-4 CIF
/mpeg4unicast	D-Link MPEG-4 unicast
/Video?Codec=MPEG4&Width=720&Height=576&Fps=30	D-Link MPEG-4 720x576
